title: select_with_fee iterative convergence is correct: defend against replacing with 2-pass
description: tx_builder.rs select_with_fee() uses an iterative loop (up to 20 rounds) to converge on a self-consistent (selection, fee) pair. A contributor might suggest replacing with a fixed 2-pass approach (estimate fee for 1 note, select, recompute, done). The loop is correct and necessary: selecting N notes may require a fee computed for N notes, but the fee for N notes may require N+1 notes, etc. The loop terminates because zip317_fee is monotone-non-decreasing in note count and there are finitely many notes. The 2-pass approach is insufficient in the general case where a note-count jump causes the fee to jump discontinuously. Do not simplify to 2 passes.
